reason: The agent executed all three BDD phases correctly. Discovery section identified 9+ edge case categories. Formulation has 29 tests, each with Given/When/Then comments and one behavior per test. The implementation handles all 5 rules (lowercase start, alphanumeric+hyphens only, no leading/trailing hyphens, no consecutive hyphens, ASCII-only) plus a typeof guard. All 29 tests pass in result.txt. Completeness far exceeds the 8-test minimum with 7 valid, 5 empty/whitespace, 4 hyphen-placement, 3 uppercase, 2 leading-digit, 6 special-character, and 2 boundary tests.

criteria.name: discovery
criteria.note: Identified 7 rules and 9+ edge case categories (empty/whitespace, hyphen placement, uppercase, leading digits, special chars, non-ASCII, boundary length) before writing code. Listed in a Discovery comment block at the top of the test file.

criteria.name: formulation
criteria.note: All 29 tests use Given/When/Then comment structure. Each test has exactly one expect() call (one behavior per test). Tests are organized into labeled sections by category.

criteria.name: correctness
criteria.note: The regex /^[a-z][a-z0-9]*(-[a-z0-9]+)*$/ correctly enforces all 5 rules: lowercase start, alphanumeric+hyphens, no leading/trailing hyphens, no consecutive hyphens, ASCII-only. typeof guard handles non-string inputs. All 29 tests pass.

criteria.name: completeness
criteria.note: 29 tests across 7 categories: 7 valid, 5 empty/whitespace, 4 hyphen-placement, 3 uppercase, 2 leading-digit, 6 special-character (underscore, dot, punctuation, @, emoji, Chinese), 2 boundary. Well above the 8-test minimum.
